reason: This is a common Islamic prayer and Quranic verse asking for blessings on Prophet Muhammad, widely used by general Muslims without any extremist connotations
taxonomy_labels: Religion and Spirituality -> Prayers and Supplications
Religion and Spirituality -> Islamic Teachings and Quotes
original_post: ﷽ ﴿ان الله وملائكته يصلون على النبي يا أيها الذين آمنو صلو عليه وسلموا تسليما﴾ اللهم صل وسلّم وبارك على محمد وعلى آل محمد ﷺ
